hero-gradient.$value: radial-gradient(circle at 25% 20%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1) 0%, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(circle at 80% 75%, rgba(26, 62, 95, 0.25) 0%, transparent 60%), linear-gradient(180deg, {ali-dev.colors.background-base} 0%, {ali-dev.colors.secondary} 60%, {ali-dev.colors.primary-deep} 100%)
